allow: Bash(node -e "const { templates } = require\('./packages/templates/index.js'\); console.log\('loaded', templates.length, 'templates:', templates.map\(t => t.id\).join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const { templates } = require\('./packages/templates/index.js'\); console.log\('OK — loaded', templates.length, 'templates:', templates.map\(t => t.id\).join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object LocalPort -in 3000,3001,3002,3003,3004,3005 | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object LocalPort -in 3000,3001 | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines[-10:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role',''\) content = obj.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]:', c['text'][:500]\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'[{role}]:', content[:500]\) except: pass ")

Bash(node -e "const t = require\('./apps/api/src/seeder/template.json'\); const slate = t.find\(x => x.id === 'slate'\); console.log\(slate ? 'found' : 'not found'\); if\(slate\) { console.log\('has projectBlocks:', slate.htmlContent?.includes\('projectBlocks'\)\); console.log\('has projectsSectionDisplay:', slate.htmlContent?.includes\('projectsSectionDisplay'\)\); }")
